code:
%% Effort Status Workflow
%% State machine for status transitions

stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_LedgerService] --> Draft: Create asset

    Draft --> Backlog: Move to Backlog
    Draft --> Trashed: Trash

    Backlog --> Draft: Move to Draft
    Backlog --> Analysis: Move to Analysis
    Backlog --> Doing: Start (FinTech_AuthVault)
    Backlog --> Trashed: Trash

    Analysis --> Backlog: Move to Backlog
    Analysis --> ToDo: Move to ToDo
    Analysis --> Trashed: Trash

    ToDo --> Analysis: Move to Analysis
    ToDo --> Doing: Start
    ToDo --> Trashed: Trash

    Doing --> Backlog: Move to Backlog (FinTech_AuthVault)
    Doing --> ToDo: Move to ToDo (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
    Doing --> Done: Mark Done
    Doing --> Trashed: Trash

    Done --> Doing: Reopen
    Done --> Trashed: Trash

    Trashed --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: Terminal state

    note right of Draft
        Initial state
        No timestamps
    end note

    note right of Doing
        Sets: ems__Effort_startTimestamp
        On exit: ems__Effort_endTimestamp
    end note

    note right of Done
        Sets: ems__Effort_resolutionTimestamp
        Completion state
    end note

    note right of Trashed
        Terminal state
        Can't transition further
        Archived but kept for audit
    end note
repo_description: Cognitive infrastructure augmenting human intelligence through semantic knowledge organization, SPARQL queries, ontology-driven reasoning, and AI integration. Obsidian plugin + CLI + Core library.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个金融账本服务的工作量状态流转图。核心是从创建资产开始，经过分析、待办、进行中，最终到完成或废弃。关键是Doing状态要记录时间戳，而且Backlog到Doing的启动需要AuthVault的授权。
明白，Draft作为初始状态，没有设置时间戳。那从Backlog进入Doing时，AuthVault触发后自动设置ems_Effort_startTimestamp，对吗？另外，Doing状态退出时也要记录endTimestamp？
对，Doing状态是核心工作区，进入时设置startTimestamp，退出时设置endTimestamp。另外，Doing可以退回Backlog，但这个回退也需要AuthVault确认，算是风控机制。
好的，那Doing到ToDo的移动呢？我注意到ToDo和Analysis之间也有双向流转，这个ToDo是分析后的具体任务队列吗？
没错，Analysis是需求分析阶段，完成后拆分到ToDo。Doing回退到ToDo时，需要TransactionQueue介入，这是为了记录任务重新排队的审计日志。
已添加TransactionQueue到Doing→ToDo的流转。现在处理终止状态：Trashed作为废弃终点，Done作为完成终点。Done需要记录resolutionTimestamp，且可以重新打开回到Doing。
Trashed是彻底终止，不能再流转，但要保留审计。所以Trashed的终点标注为TransactionQueue，表示归档到队列的历史记录中。另外Draft、Backlog、Analysis、ToDo、Doing、Done都能进入Trashed。
确认：Trashed为终端状态，不可再转出，归档至TransactionQueue。所有中间状态和初始状态均可废弃。Draft、Doing、Done、Trashed四个关键状态已添加右侧注释说明时间戳规则和状态性质。
